title: Add M4 director recovery windows
summary: Add bounded director pressure sampling, incident/recovery candidate selection, cooldowns, recovery windows and structured rejection reasons.
acceptance: Director pressure reads aggregate metrics for lamps evidence obligations active crises injuries mental risk and unresolved cases without owning those facts
Incident and recovery opportunity selection uses bounded candidates stable ordering named random streams cooldowns and structured rejection reasons
Recovery windows suppress unrelated pressure and expose repair opportunities without erasing evidence forgiving debts healing residents or rewriting crisis state
Director commands route through normal world owner-store command paths and cannot directly mutate lamp evidence obligation town-rule health relationship or crisis facts
Focused tests cover pressure sampling candidate caps cooldowns recovery boundaries no direct fact mutation deterministic stream use and Worker/headless replay stability

history.details: Created by WM-0061 M4 planning DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.

objective: Implement a constrained M4 director pressure and recovery surface without turning the director into hidden simulation authority.
forbiddenPaths: direct mutation of lamp evidence obligation town-rule health relationship crisis or resource facts
broad event pool faction campaign season system or M5 content
public save format or schema changes
real time ambient randomness hidden shared state or unbounded incident scan
benchmarkImpact: Adds director pressure sample incident candidate rejection cooldown recovery-window and opportunity counters; baseline updates wait for WM-0070.
reviewRouting: Simulation-engineer completes to reviewer; systems-architect must be consulted before changing director authority, random streams, or recovery-window semantics.
rollbackModel: Revert M4 director pressure/recovery stores, tests, metrics and docs; preserve prior M4 owner surfaces and M0-M3 behavior.
ownerGate: Director reads aggregate metrics and schedules legal commands only
Do not let director directly mutate facts or erase consequences
Use named streams and bounded candidates
Block on public protocol save schema dependency UI authority M5 or hidden-state scope

sparkEligibility.reason: Director authority and recovery-window design is architecture-sensitive deterministic simulation work.
